title: Settings Center foundation
goal: Create apps.settings_center with descriptor registry, dashboard shell, permission checks and audit skeleton.
acceptance: apps.settings_center is added to INSTALLED_APPS with clear app boundary.
Descriptor registry can collect descriptors from core, accounts, AI and memory modules.
Dashboard lists registered domains/sections and blocks unauthorized users server-side.
SettingsChange or equivalent audit skeleton exists and stores masked metadata only.
No domain-specific business logic is embedded in the Settings Center registry.
Project structure metadata is updated after adding the app.
